title: Checkpoints should be used instead of sleep
description: Uses of sleep() should be replaced with checkpoints to improve test stability.
message: Avoid using sleep() function for test stability.
why_is_this_an_issue: Sleep() can lead to test instability due to varying execution times.
how_to_fix: Replace sleep() with checkpoints by using test framework's built-in checkpoints or patching the sleep function.

checks.message: Avoid using sleep() function for test stability.
Avoid using time.sleep() for test stability.
